overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy neon-lit downtown district. The player walks along wet streets past holographic advertisements and the prominent 'softsys' building, eventually approaching a massive golden phoenix statue with a floating platform suspended above it.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: teal sports car passes by on the right side of the road
large truck passes by on the right, headlights illuminating the fog

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the roadside guardrail, observing the neon-lit cityscape

notable_agents.action: teal sports car driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: Large commercial building with prominent green neon 'softsys' signage and multiple floors
Glowing advertisements and brand displays covering building facades
Metal barrier with yellow reflective strips separating walkway from traffic
Tall modern street lamps casting bright light through the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet multi-lane road in a foggy cyberpunk downtown district. The prominent 'softsys' building with green neon signage dominates the left side, while holographic advertisements glow on distant buildings. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the right as the camera moves forward along the guardrail.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional area between commercial district and open plaza

events.description: curving left away from the dense commercial strip into more open area with vegetation
moving off the paved sidewalk into grassy terrain alongside the road

agents.ego_description: following the curve of the road while moving through patches of tall grass and bushes

entered.detail: Distant illuminated skyscrapers visible through the hazy night air
Tall wild grass and bushes growing alongside the urban path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera curves left away from the dense commercial buildings. The softsys building recedes behind as the view expands to show the distant city skyline through fog. The camera moves through increasing vegetation—tall grass and bushes—while the road continues to curve ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approach with monumental sculpture and suspended platform

events.description: golden phoenix statue becomes visible in the distance, illuminated against the fog
slowing down to approach the statue plaza, moving onto grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: approaching the illuminated statue through grassy areas, observing the floating structure above

entered.detail: Massive golden sculpture of a phoenix with elaborate spread wings, illuminated from below
Rectangular platform suspended by thick cables high above the statue
Tall palm trees surrounding the statue plaza, silhouetted against the fog

segments.scene_description: Approaching a dramatic plaza featuring a massive golden phoenix statue illuminated against the foggy night. A floating platform hangs suspended by cables above the sculpture. The camera moves through surrounding vegetation and palm trees, leaving the distant city skyline behind as the monument dominates the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument plaza with golden phoenix sculpture and aerial platform

events.description: circling around the base of the statue to view it from multiple angles
fog thickens around the illuminated statue, creating dramatic lighting effects

agents.ego_description: circling the base of the golden phoenix statue, looking up at the floating platform and intricate wing details

entered.detail: Upward-facing spotlights at the statue base creating dramatic illumination

segments.scene_description: Close-up views of the massive golden phoenix statue, with the camera circling its base to capture the intricate wing details and the floating platform suspended above. Ground spotlights create dramatic upward illumination through the thickening fog, while palm trees frame the scene in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk district that gradually transitions from a dense urban corridor into a dramatic monumental plaza. It begins along a wet multi-lane road dominated by the green neon signage of the softsys building and glowing holographic advertisements. As the camera curves left, the commercial buildings recede and the view expands toward a distant city skyline filtered through a thick fog, with the road cutting through emerging patches of tall grass and bushes. The scene then opens into a wide plaza where the city skyline fades behind palm trees, revealing a massive golden phoenix statue with a floating platform suspended by cables above it. Finally, the camera circles the base of the monument, capturing intricate wing details illuminated by dramatic ground spotlights that pierce through the thickening night fog.
